titlestmt.titleproper: First Baptist Church of Ithaca records2004

This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
First Baptist Church of Ithaca records
First Baptist Church of Ithaca
2004
21.6 cubic feet. 21.6 cubic feet. 2 tape recordings.,
1811-2005. Correspondence, scrapbooks, pamphlets, books, minutes, tape recordings, architectural plans. Materials from the Board of Trustees, boards of deacons and deaconesses, and church meetings; lists of members, baptisms, and funerals; records of women's and youth organizations; Sunday School materials; letters from donors to the church building fund. Tape recordings of services; plans for remodelling the church; records of the Danby Baptist Church and the First Baptist Church of Christ of Ithaca. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 29 ======= 29 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2079266
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
F. Tellez, N. Dean
Date completed:
1980, 1997
EAD encoding:
Julia Guarneri, August 2002
Date modified:
Fredrika Loew, October 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Minutes of the Board of Trustees, boards of deacons and deaconesses, and church meetings; lists of members, baptisms, and funerals; minutes statistics and correspondence of various church officials and boards; constitution; financial records; minutes, reports, accounts, and other records of various women's and youth organizations, including the Women's Missionary Society, Women's Union, and Women's Fellowship; Sunday School rolls and minutes; various other letters, resolutions, pamphlets, scrapbooks, photographs, hymn books, church newsletters, historical data, and letters from donors to the church building fund, 1889-91. There are also tape recordings of services conducted by Rev. Christian B. Jensen; plans for remodelling the church, Clarence A. Martin, architect, 1930-32; and records of the Danby Baptist Church and the First Baptist Church of Christ of Ithaca, 1811-38.
SERIES LIST
Series I. General files
Series II. Letters regarding construction of new church
Series III. Church history
Series IV. Renovation, 1970s
Series V. Cash Books
Series VI. Media
Series VII. Studies and drawings for remodelling of the First Baptist Church, Ithaca, N.Y., 1930-1932
Cite As:
First Baptist Church of Ithaca records, #2004. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access to Box 8 restricted until 18 July 2047
Access Restrictions:
Access to Box 10 restricted until 18 July 2067.
Photographs. Hymnals. Architectural drawings. Women in missionary work. Women in church work. Religion. Missionaries. Church architecture. Baptists. Jensen, Christian B. Martin, Clarence A. Danby Baptist Church First Baptist Church of Christ of Ithaca

Side 2, Channel B - Jensen Dec. 27, 1964Series VII. Studies and drawings for remodelling of the First Baptist Church, Ithaca, N.Y., 1930-1932
Scope and Contents
These concern alterations to the Chancel, Organ, Vestry, Pulpit, Lectern, Sunday School Quarters, closets, bookcases, etc.
Architect - Clarence A. Martin, Ithaca, N.Y. in conjunction with George E. Merrill, The American Baptist Home Mission Society, New York, N.Y.1 Original pencil drawing, 9" x 13"118 Dyelines, 12" x 18"15 Blueprints - 3 16" x 20", 1 18" x 26", 1 20" x 30"16 Tracing cloths - 2 11" x 12", 2 16" x 20", 1 18" x 24", 1 20" x 30"117 Tracing paper sheets - 7 "14" x 18", 4 16" x 18", 6 20" x 30"11 Dyeline, 11" x 15"13 Blueprints 8" x 13"12 Letters from Austin Organ Company (Copies in drawing folder, originals with main collection)Dec. 17, 1931Jan. 18, 193211 Letter from George E. Side 2, Channel B - Jensen Dec. 27, 1964Series VII. Studies and drawings for remodelling of the First Baptist Church, Ithaca, N.Y., 1930-1932
Scope and Contents
These concern alterations to the Chancel, Organ, Vestry, Pulpit, Lectern, Sunday School Quarters, closets, bookcases, etc.
Architect - Clarence A. Martin, Ithaca, N.Y. in conjunction with George E.
